title: KBUtilLib 2.0 — research-project layout, plan workflow, and adoption
summary: Restructures KBUtilLib research-project layout (root data/models/genomes + leaner subproject tree), redesigns /kbu-plan as a 4-step grilled flow with literature-review subagent, adds kbu subproject adopt + /kbu-migrate for onboarding existing notebook dirs, and introduces a kbu-*/kbu-sub-* naming policy with command/agent kind routing in claude-skills sync.
features: kbu-plan 4-step grilled flow (goals, literature subagent, detailed plan, task decomposition)
Root data/, models/, genomes/ shared dirs (extensible via [layout.shared_dirs])
Subproject layout: drop data/+user_data/, add literature/+.cache/ (hidden)
kbu subproject adopt + archive-first move + /kbu-migrate skill
Naming policy: kbu-* commands + kbu-sub-* subagents (.claude/agents/) via kind: frontmatter
